name: webhooks
description: Optional signed HTTP notifications for framework events.

settings.label: Endpoint URL
settings.description: HTTPS endpoint that receives JSON event notifications.

settings.label: Signing secret
settings.description: Used to create the X-Lightdocs-Signature HMAC header.

settings.label: Include event payload
settings.description: Send event metadata to the endpoint. Disable this when only the event name and delivery time are needed.

settings.label: Timeout seconds
settings.description: Maximum time allowed for each delivery attempt.
